Story: Fork Cowrie and run its experimental LLM backend against local Ollama
AcceptanceCriteria: Cowrie fork boots; LLM backend answers a command via local Ollama; documented run steps

Story: Select and pin the LLM (qwen2.5:3b default; 7-8B candidates)
AcceptanceCriteria: Model + version pinned in .env and README; pulled via ollama pull; reproducible

Story: Repo scaffold (structure README .gitignore LICENSE runnable demo)
AcceptanceCriteria: Tree created; python -m state_grounded runs; pytest green

Story: Docker support (Dockerfile per component + docker-compose.yml)
AcceptanceCriteria: compose file valid; middleware image builds and runs demo

Story: Define scripted-session format and versioned sample sessions
AcceptanceCriteria: JSON schema agreed; >=1 sample session committed; loader reads them

Story: Implement session runner + metric scoring
AcceptanceCriteria: Replays sessions; computes consistency/detection/latency/LLM-call-rate

Story: Record baseline (before) numbers on vanilla Cowrie+LLM
AcceptanceCriteria: before.json produced; numbers documented in report

Story: Virtual filesystem model (create/delete/modify files+dirs)
AcceptanceCriteria: mkdir/rm/touch reflected; ls shows correct contents across many turns; unit tests

Story: Track cwd and basic environment variables
AcceptanceCriteria: cd/pwd correct; PWD/HOME/USER tracked; unit tests

Story: Deterministic fast-path for cd pwd mkdir rm touch ls
AcceptanceCriteria: listed commands answered without LLM; correct exit codes

Story: Env vars (export echo $VAR) exit code ($?) users (whoami) process table
AcceptanceCriteria: export/echo/$?/whoami consistent; basic ps; unit tests

Story: Integrate state engine into Cowrie LLM command flow
AcceptanceCriteria: deterministic commands served by engine inside Cowrie; LLM only for the rest

Story: Inject state snapshot into LLM system prompt before each generation
AcceptanceCriteria: snapshot present in prompt; multi-turn responses stay consistent in smoke tests

Story: Basic response normalization (light contradiction check)
AcceptanceCriteria: obvious state contradictions caught/regenerated; documented limits

Story: End-to-end smoke tests on multi-turn sessions
AcceptanceCriteria: after build passes scripted multi-turn smoke tests

Story: FastAPI backend: read Cowrie JSON event log; GET /api/sessions and /api/sessions/{id}
AcceptanceCriteria: endpoints return sessions + per-session commands parsed from cowrie.json

Story: Live events feed (WebSocket /api/stream)
AcceptanceCriteria: new events pushed to connected clients without polling

Story: React UI: sessions list (IP start-time command-count)
AcceptanceCriteria: sessions list renders from API; sortable; auto-updates

Story: React UI: per-session command timeline with fast-path/LLM badge
AcceptanceCriteria: clicking a session shows ordered commands+responses with source badge

Story: Dashboard analytics view (commands/session LLM-call-rate top commands)
AcceptanceCriteria: charts for key metrics rendered from API

Story: Add dashboard (backend+frontend) to Docker Compose; basic error handling
AcceptanceCriteria: docker compose up serves dashboard; handles empty/missing log gracefully

Story: Run after numbers + before/after comparison
AcceptanceCriteria: after.json produced; comparison table generated

Story: Ablation study (state tracker vs grounding vs fast-path)
AcceptanceCriteria: each component's contribution isolated; documented

Story: Charts + results write-up
AcceptanceCriteria: charts generated; results section drafted

Story: One-command Docker Compose deploy (cowrie+ollama+middleware)
AcceptanceCriteria: docker compose up brings full stack online; model pulled at setup

Story: README system requirements + setup; finalize config and CI/tests
AcceptanceCriteria: README complete; CI green on PR; tests pass

Story: Record demo (vanilla breaks character vs grounded stays consistent)
AcceptanceCriteria: demo recording shows clear before/after on state-dependent commands

Story: Open upstream PR/issue to Cowrie; finalize report
AcceptanceCriteria: PR/issue opened to cowrie/cowrie; final report submitted

Story: Refusal scrubber / output validator / latency normalizer / prompt-injection defense / TI enrichment
AcceptanceCriteria: only if time allows; not in required MVP scope
